cot_prefix: Okay, let's read the story and figure out the answer. So, there's a farmer in central China who uses an old horse to plow his field because he can't afford a tractor. The horse dies, but instead of getting upset, the farmer just says, "We'll see." The villagers admire his calmness and give him a new horse. Then the horse runs away, and he still says "We'll see."
